title: Adding fractions with like denominators

segments.narration: To add fractions, the pieces need to be the same size first.
When denominators match, just add the numerators and keep the denominator.
Try it: one half plus one fourth â€” convert halves to fourths, then add.
Same-sized pieces let us add fractions safely â€” great work!

teacherNotes: Stress equal piece size before combining numerators.
